reviews.comment:
Falta atencion al publico solo 2 cajas para cobrar y colas de 1 cuadra un desastre baños pesimos y el ACA donde está??????

(Translated by Google)
There's a lack of customer service, only two checkout counters and lines a block long—it's a disaster! The bathrooms are terrible, and where's the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina)?

reviews.comment:
Lugar con mucha gente, rápida atención de los playeros, baños limpios y coffe shop con variedad de productos, buena atención, pero de precios no económicos.

(Translated by Google)
A busy place, fast service from the beach attendants, clean bathrooms, and a coffee shop with a variety of products; good service, but not cheap.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar pata hacet una parada a mitad de camino entre Capital y la Costa.
Tienen muy buenos servicios, tiene un deck para comer al aire libre con sombrillas, juego para chicos y una parrilla restaurant.
Bosque de eucaliptus , gran playa de estacionamiento y baños amplios y muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop halfway between the city and the coast.
They have excellent amenities, including a deck for outdoor dining with umbrellas, a children's playground, and a grill restaurant. There's also a eucalyptus grove, a large parking area, and spacious, very clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNbHI2VEJREAE

reviews.comment:
Amplio lugar al aire libre para estacionar , limpieza en los baños , muy buena atención del personal al.cliente, varios expendedores de nafta. Restaurante y confitería muy buenos.

(Translated by Google)
Ample outdoor parking, clean restrooms, excellent customer service, several gas stations. Very good restaurant and café.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNcGJlcDVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Le pongo 5 por la limpieza de los baños en especial el de mujeres, las chicas que trabajan lo dejan impecable  y local. Afuera está un poco descuidado pero bien el pasto cortado. Parada infaltable para llegar a destino menos contracturado

(Translated by Google)
I give it 5 stars for the cleanliness of the restrooms, especially the women's; the staff leaves it spotless and friendly. Outside it's a bit neglected, but the grass is well-cut. A must-stop to reach your destination with less stress.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNeFpmS1dREAE
